content.en:
The entrance and exit of the sacred mountain of life.

The Saint Ancestor, Great Saint Ancestor, and Old Ancestor of the Life Green Clan lingered here, discussing which Guardian Rank could obtain the Life Sacred Stone, and who dared to enter the Land of Inheritance to obtain the Inheritance.

Even, they were discussing which escort team level had high potential and had the hope of advancing to the Great Saint Ancestor level and the Old Ancestor level in the future, and Ye Tian was the object of their key discussion.

Because Ye Tian is too good, he is perfect in all aspects, and his potential is absolutely high, and he is the object of their attention, even other tree cities outside Bayin City have heard of Ye Tian's reputation, which shows that Ye Tian's fame is great.

However, they never expected that Ye Tian would be a person from the outside world, otherwise they would be so angry that they would crush Ye Tian to pieces.

"There's a convoy class coming out!"

A Saint Ancestor-level spoke.

Wow!

'Green Peak' rushed out from the inside of the Life God Mountain, with a relaxed and excited face.

As soon as he came out, he took out three Life Sacred Stones, kept one for himself, and exchanged the remaining two for the Life Green Clan in exchange for a large amount of resources.

And the deal was done on the spot!

After Ye Tian's transaction was over, he announced that he would go back to retreat and cultivate, he didn't want to delay time, and he didn't want to communicate too much with those Holy Ancestor and Great Saint Ancestor level, the more exchanges, the easier it was to be exposed.

Although his body is exactly the same as Green Peak, his memory is different, if he says the wrong thing, it will cause the exploration of the Life Green Clan, and Ye Tian's body hiding in the space of Green Peak's body will be discovered.

So, Ye Tian hurriedly left the Life God Mountain and entered the Green God City.

But Ye Tian didn't stay in the Green God City for long, he knew that there would definitely be turmoil on the side of the Life God Mountain, because Ye disappeared.

Although he is Ye, others don't know!

His reincarnation innate was lifted, and the guard-level leaf disappeared completely, and he could no longer use the ability of reincarnation innate in a short period of time, and even if he could, he had to start from scratch, so it was useless.

Ye's disappearance will inevitably cause turmoil in the Life Green Clan, and the upper echelons of the Life Green Clan will definitely investigate, and he doesn't want any accidents.

Anyway, his current goal has been achieved, and there is no need to continue to stay in the Life Green Clan.

However, before leaving, Ye Tian used the identity of Green Peak to exchange a large number of Hedao treasures.

In the past, Ye Tian didn't understand the origin of the Hedao treasure, but now that he has accepted the memory inheritance of the Green Dao Ancestor, he suddenly understands.

The treasures of the Harmony Dao are divided into the innate Harmony Treasure and the acquired Harmony Treasure, and the innate Harmony Treasure has the highest value, 100% of which can make a true ancestor Harmony become a Dao Ancestor, and the value of the acquired Harmony Treasure is much lower.

The point is that the acquired Hedao treasure can only be assisted, and if you take it in the future, the effect will almost be gone.

The Celestial Dao Treasure is the use of a top-level innate origin thing, a trace of life origin power condensed by a top-level true ancestor, the corresponding secret technique, and a special environment.

In such a situation, if you cultivate it slowly, you can form a Hedao treasure.

Among them, the trace of life origin power condensed by the top true ancestor is very precious, and the true ancestor does not dare to use it casually, otherwise it will hurt the foundation, but the life green clan is different, they have no potential to advance to the Dao ancestor, and the life origin is too strong, so they are not afraid.

In addition, the world transformed by the corpse of the Green Yin Dao Ancestor is the most suitable for the cultivation of Merge Dao treasures, so so many Merge Dao treasures can be born here.

As for why the Infinite Abyss can also give birth to the Convergence Treasure, that is the special nature of the Infinite Abyss, but it is not an innate Convergence Treasure, but it is forcibly catalyzed by the power of the Infinite Abyss.

When the Green Yin Dao Ancestor was hiding in the Infinite Abyss, he studied this characteristic and developed the secret technique of cultivating the treasure of the Convergence Dao.

However, on the whole, the value of the Merge Treasure cultivated by the Life Green Clan is not as good as that of the Merge Treasure of the Infinite Abyss, the auxiliary effect of the Merge Treasure of the Infinite Abyss is about 30%, while the auxiliary effect of the Merge Treasure cultivated by the Life Green Clan is about 10% to 20%.

But even so, with the advantage of numbers, the value of the Hedao treasure of the Life Green Clan is too precious.

Time passed day by day.

Ye Tian had collected at least 100,000 Hedao treasures, which was also the limit of what Ye Tian could collect.

Although the Life Green Clan can easily cultivate the Merge Dao Treasure, it also takes time, and the Life Green Clan is consuming the Merge Dao Treasure all the time, so the number of Merge Dao Treasures cannot be too much.

If it weren't for the fact that the Life Green Clan didn't pay much attention to the Hedao treasures, Ye Tian wouldn't have been able to collect so much.

With 100,000 pieces of Hedao treasures in hand, Ye Tian began to leave secretly.

Along the way, Ye Tian relied on the exploration method of copying talent to evade all the patrol officers and easily came to the World Transmission Channel.

It's not that the Life Green Clan can't leave this world, but they strictly follow the ancestral teachings and can't leave casually, coupled with the suppression of the rules of the Quasi-Dao Realm in the outside world, the strong people above the Holy Ancestor level dare not go out.

In addition, the abyss monsters were too weak, and the Life Green Clan did not pay attention to them, so they did not station troops in this world passage.

So, Ye Tian easily left this world.

......

Green God City.

The Life Green Clan also discovered that Green Peak was missing soon after, they didn't specifically investigate Green Peak, but Ye disappeared, so they asked if anyone at the guard level knew about Ye's traces.

And the Life Green Clan forbids killing their companions, and if someone kills Ye, they will definitely be severely punished.

So, they contacted Green Peak to inquire.

But they couldn't get in touch, which means that Green Peak is also missing.

Soon, they discovered through various secret techniques that Green Peak had left Tree City, and there was evidence that Green Peak had left this world through the World Passage and entered the Infinite Abyss.

As a result, they decided that Green Peak was the murderer who killed Ye, but this statement was denied by many people, after all, judging from the combat power on the surface, Green Peak should not be Ye's opponent.

The Green Clan has been arguing for a long time about this issue.

And at this moment, Ye Tian had already returned to the Infinite Abyss.

-------------

"It's finally back!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

During this period of time in the Life Green Clan, he was really frightened, after all, it was too dangerous there, and a bunch of True Ancestor-level powerhouses couldn't come back if they weren't careful.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left from the core area of the Infinite Abyss Fragment, avoiding all the Abyss Lords along the way and not fighting them.

In this way, Ye Tian returned to the periphery of the Infinite Abyss Fragment.

He didn't kill the disciples of the Royal Beast Sect, it was useless.

After all, those Imperial Beast Sect disciples were just a group of half-step True Ancestor disciples, not real high-level disciples, and it was useless to kill them.

Moreover, the half-step True Ancestors of other forces were constantly fighting with the disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect like fragments of the Infinite Abyss.

So, he doesn't have to worry about this matter.

Besides, Ye Tian now has no shortage of Merge Dao treasures, and he doesn't need to stay in the Infinite Abyss Fragment Ruins.

So, Ye Tian returned to the outside world and returned to the human race.
